name: @string/ab_stone_ember_name
description: An fire-charged stone. Bring a Cinderkin beast to a Beast Center breeder to evolve it.

name: @string/ab_stone_tide_name
description: An water-charged stone. Bring a Tidefolk beast to a Beast Center breeder to evolve it.

name: @string/ab_stone_verdant_name
description: An grass-charged stone. Bring a Verdant beast to a Beast Center breeder to evolve it.

name: @string/ab_stone_storm_name
description: An lightning-charged stone. Bring a Stormborn beast to a Beast Center breeder to evolve it.

name: @string/ab_stone_frost_name
description: An ice-charged stone. Bring a Rimekin beast to a Beast Center breeder to evolve it.

name: @string/ab_stone_stone_name
description: An earth-charged stone. Bring a Geokin beast to a Beast Center breeder to evolve it.

name: @string/ab_stone_dusk_name
description: An shadow-charged stone. Bring a Shadeborn beast to a Beast Center breeder to evolve it.

name: @string/ab_stone_aether_name
description: An light-charged stone. Bring a Aetherborn beast to a Beast Center breeder to evolve it.

name: @string/ab_stone_void_name
description: An void-charged stone. Bring a Wyrmkin beast to a Beast Center breeder to evolve it.

name: @string/ab_stone_resonant_name
description: A universal evolution catalyst. Works on any clade.

name: @string/ab_incense_pair_name
description: Burned at the breeding alcove of any Beast Center. Permits two compatible beasts to leave an egg.

name: @string/ab_dex_ember_name
description: A folio that records every Astral Beast sighted in Emberlands.

description: A folio that records every Astral Beast sighted in Tideholm.

description: A folio that records every Astral Beast sighted in Verdant Reach.

description: A folio that records every Astral Beast sighted in Stormcrest.

name: @string/ab_dex_frost_name
description: A folio that records every Astral Beast sighted in Frostvale.

name: @string/ab_dex_stone_name
description: A folio that records every Astral Beast sighted in Stoneheart.

name: @string/ab_dex_dusk_name
description: A folio that records every Astral Beast sighted in Duskwood.

name: @string/ab_dex_aether_name
description: A folio that records every Astral Beast sighted in Aetherspire.

name: @string/ab_dex_void_name
description: A folio that records every Astral Beast sighted in Voidmarsh.

name: @string/ab_dex_master_name
description: The collected folios of every region. Held only by the world's foremost trainers.

name: @string/ab_pass_ember_name
description: Awarded by Pyralis of Ashbridge. Proof you have mastered the Cinderkin circuit.

name: @string/ab_pass_tide_name
description: Awarded by Marenna of Saltspire. Proof you have mastered the Tidefolk circuit.

name: @string/ab_pass_verdant_name
description: Awarded by Ferna of Mossglen. Proof you have mastered the Verdant circuit.

name: @string/ab_pass_storm_name
description: Awarded by Volta of Boltreach. Proof you have mastered the Stormborn circuit.

name: @string/ab_pass_frost_name
description: Awarded by Crysell of Hoarwatch. Proof you have mastered the Rimekin circuit.

name: @string/ab_pass_stone_name
description: Awarded by Korran of Granitemarch. Proof you have mastered the Geokin circuit.

name: @string/ab_pass_dusk_name
description: Awarded by Nyxara of Hollowfen. Proof you have mastered the Shadeborn circuit.

name: @string/ab_pass_aether_name
description: Awarded by Solarya of Highmere. Proof you have mastered the Aetherborn circuit.

name: @string/ab_pass_void_name
description: Awarded by Morrigane of Greylight. Proof you have mastered the Wyrmkin circuit.

name: @string/ab_q_tide_lantern_bead_name
description: A glass bead that holds a flicker of stormlight. The Saltspire keeper needs it to relight the lantern.

name: @string/ab_q_tide_pearl_token_name
description: A small pearl etched with the diver's mark. Proof you completed the Pearl Survey.
